title: Data Engineer - Snowflake Native ETL Migration
description: We are seeking an experienced Data Engineer to design and build a Snowflake-native ETL pipeline, migrating an existing Dagster/PostgreSQL architecture into a fully Snowflake-based solution. This engagement is ideal for a hands-on engineer who thrives in greenfield data infrastructure work.
responsibilities: Architect and implement a Snowflake-native ETL pipeline that replaces an existing Dagster/PostgreSQL process end-to-end
Build multi-source data ingestion pipelines pulling from REST APIs, bulk file downloads, and SFTP sources
Translate complex existing logic — including fuzzy name-matching (Jaro-Winkler similarity) and recursive CTEs — into performant Snowflake SQL at scale (1M+ records)
Implement robust deduplication strategies within Snowflake
Set up and maintain CI/CD deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions to manage code deployments to Snowflake
Read and interpret the existing Dagster pipeline to ensure full feature parity in the new architecture
Collaborate with the internal team to document the new architecture and support knowledge transfer

required: Snowflake — deep hands-on experience with Snowflake SQL, performance tuning, and native features (Streams, Tasks, Stages, etc.)
Python — proficiency in Python for data pipeline development and scripting
GitHub Actions — demonstrated experience deploying code to Snowflake via GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows
Data pipeline experience — proven ability to build pipelines from REST APIs, file-based (bulk download), and SFTP sources
nice_to_have: dbt — experience with dbt for data transformation and modeling within Snowflake
Dagster — familiarity with Dagster (or similar orchestration tools) to aid in reading and migrating the existing pipeline
Nonprofit data sources — knowledge of IRS BMF, PayPal Giving Fund, CAF, or similar datasets
Fuzzy matching / advanced SQL — experience implementing Jaro-Winkler or other similarity algorithms and recursive CTEs in SQL
